MELItem.Title: Forward Cargo Air Conditioning (FCAC) Bypass Valve (VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A865, VN-A866, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A869, VN-A870, VN-A871)

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided bypass valve is deactivated open.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate bypass valve in open position (AMM DDG 21-54-03).

ListItem.Para: Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker BYPASS VLV-CARGO REFRIG UNIT HX and lock with an INOP tag.
Gain access to FCAC bypass valve.
Disconnect, cap and stow valve electrical connector.
Turn the open/close knob until the valve is in the open position.
Set FWD CARGO A/C as desired.

OperationNote.Para: Forward cargo air conditioning capability may be degraded. Forward cargo temperatures may be cooler than desired. The Pilot in Command shall assess any special load planned for the affected cargo compartment and ensure that it does not contain anything sensitive to temperature variations or sensitive to the lack of ventilation.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided FCAC remains OFF.

OperationNote.Para: Forward cargo air conditioning is not available. The Pilot in Command shall assess any special load planned for the affected cargo compartment and ensure that it does not contain anything sensitive to temperature variations or sensitive to the lack of ventilation.
